title: AARP HELPLINE - 211info
text: AARP OREGON AARP HELPLINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a caregiver helpline for people taking care of loved ones. Does not provide advice, but can suggest resources on a variety of topics. 1455 SW Broadway Suite 1490 Portland, OR 97201 Eligibility: Caregivers of family members Hours: Monday-Friday 5am-5pm Email (877) 335-5885 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Helpline (877) 335-5885 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Talklines/Warmlines * Caregiver Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - AARP INFORMATION SERVICES - AARP CAREGIVING COMMUNITY RESOURCES LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - FRAUD WATCH NETWORK MUTUAL SUPPORT - CONNECTING PUBLIC SAFETY - AARP DRIVER SAFETY PROGRAM TAX ORGANIZATIONS AND SERVICES - TAX AIDE SITES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. AARP OREGON
